description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, ornate design, featuring two large, symmetrical black blades with curved inner edges and jagged upper profiles. The central section of the axe head is adorned with intricate gold detailing and a prominent skull motif, giving it a menacing and decorative appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in red material with gold bands and accents, providing both grip and visual contrast. The lower end of the handle is capped with a rounded, gold pommel, adding balance and further ornamentation. The overall construction suggests a heavy, solid build, likely intended for ceremonial or display purposes rather than practical use. The combination of dark metal, gold embellishments, and red grip makes this axe visually striking and imposing.
description: A double-headed, ornate battle axe with black blades, gold detailing, and a red-wrapped handle, featuring a skull motif at the center.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large black blades, gold skull motif, and detailed red-and-gold handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle, with less visible ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical blade design and central gold detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the handle's profile and the edge of the blades.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight handle wrapped in red leather with gold bands, providing a secure grip and a slightly textured surface.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical black blades with curved inner edges, jagged upper profiles, and ornate gold detailing including a central skull motif.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with decorative gold fittings securing the blade to the handle.
